news.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Snowflake Surges On Earnings; Fed Inflation Data Due
news.description: Dow Jones futures fell slightly early Thursday overnight, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. Oil prices rose somewhat. Marvell Technology rose slightly on earnings while Snowflake surged. The Fed's favorite inflation gauge, the core PCE price index, is due before the open.

news.title: Bond market: Bar for Fed rate cuts is 'little bit lower' than hikes
news.description: Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management chief portfolio manager Matt Stucky puts the bond market (^TYX, ^TNX, ^FVX) under a microscope to examine what the Federal Reserve is signaling about possible interest rate cuts in 2026 and the broader picture for US inflation and the American consumer.

news.title: KBRA Releases Research – Energy Shock Tests Europe’s Consumer and Labour Resilience
news.description: DUBLIN, May 28, 2026--KBRA releases research examining how European and UK consumers and labour markets are absorbing another energy shock, with underlying resilience still evident despite weaker confidence and softer hiring.

news.title: Stocks knocked back from record highs as Gulf tensions flare
news.description:
STORY: Stocks fell back from record highs on Thursday.

Investors were spooked by a fresh U.S. military strike on Iran and Kuwaiti reports of a missile attack.

The update hurt market confidence in a peace deal many see as key to easing global inflation risks.

news.title: 8 Dividend S&P 500 Stocks Yield Enough To Still Be Worthwhile
news.description: It's getting tougher to find S&P 500 dividend stocks that make any sense anymore. Thanks to skyrocketing stock prices, the S&P 500's yield is now less than 1%. Meanwhile, the yield on Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF is up to nearly 4%.

news.title: Fresh Military Strikes Between US, Iran Weigh on US Equity Futures Pre-Bell
news.description: US equity futures were lower pre-bell Thursday as fresh US and Iranian strikes once again threatened

news.title: How Long Will This Stock Market Momentum Last?
news.description: The SPX and AAAPL are in the midst of eight-week and nine-week win streaks, respectively

news.title: Stocks are rallying despite the Iran war and stubborn inflation. Here's why.
news.description: The S&P 500 hit a new record on Wednesday, even as soaring gas prices fuel inflation and consumer confidence sinks.
